data.title: Quipt Home Medical Receives Final Order Approving Arrangement
data.description: Quipt Home Medical Corp., a U.S.-based provider of home medical equipment specializing in respiratory care, has received the final order from the Supreme Court of British Columbia regarding a plan of arrangement. The arrangement, under the Business Corporations Act (British Columbia), will result in affiliates of Kingswood Capital Management, L.P. and Forager Capital Management, LLC acquiring all outstanding common shares of the company for US$3.65 per share. This final court approval, received on March 5, 2026, is the last step before the arrangement's expected completion by March 16, 2026. (Word count: 77)

data.description: A recent report stated that the unemployment rate in the United States fell to 5.2% in the last month, marking a decrease from the previous rate of 5.4%. The economy added 235,000 jobs in various sectors, exceeding analysts' expectations. However, concerns about inflation persist as the consumer price index rose by 0.3% last month. This increase is pushing the annual inflation rate to 5.3%, the highest in 13 years. The Federal Reserve is closely monitoring these numbers as they consider their next steps regarding economic policies.

data.title: FRONTERA DETERMINES BINDING OFFER FROM PAREX RESOURCES INC. IS A SUPERIOR PROPOSAL TO PREVIOUSLY ANNOUNCED GEOPARK TRANSACTION
data.description: Calgary, Alberta - On March 5, 2026, Frontera Energy Corporation (TSX: FEC) revealed that the Frontera Board of Directors, alongside external legal counsel and independent financial advisors, has assessed and confirmed a binding offer. The offer's specific details were not disclosed, as the evaluation process is ongoing.
